meta_title: For Freelancers: portfolio building to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to portfolio building and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancers: Portfolio Building to Solve Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with debugging. Use this beginner-friendly guide to master portfolio building with Antigravity and Claude Code for faster, professional results.
content.answer_block: Debugging failures stem from manual oversight. By shifting to portfolio-centric development, you treat every bug as a modular component to document. Using Antigravity for rapid prototyping and Claude Code for automated error resolution, you transform debugging from a roadblock into a repeatable system that showcases your technical expertise to potential clients.
content.intro:
The cursor blinks in the void of a broken stack trace. You’ve spent three hours chasing a ghost in the machine, and the client’s deadline is looming like a thunderstorm on the horizon. The frustration isn't just the error—it's the feeling that you’re spinning your wheels instead of shipping value.

But what if every bug you encountered became a permanent asset in your portfolio? By leveraging modern AI-assisted workflows, you can stop fighting your code and start architecting it. We’re moving beyond manual debugging into a streamlined, automated era where your ability to resolve errors becomes the strongest marketing tool for your freelance career.

steps.title: Define Your Architectural Blueprint
steps.description: Establish a clean project structure before writing code to minimize hidden complexity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a boilerplate project structure for a Next.js SaaS app with a focus on modular error logging and state management.

steps.title: Automate Error Capture
steps.description: Implement a logging middleware that captures stack traces into a portfolio-ready format.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust error handling middleware for an Express/Next.js API that logs errors to a JSON file for later analysis.
steps.claude_code_command: claude apply 'Add global error handling middleware to src/middleware.ts'

steps.title: Refactor Bugs into Case Studies
steps.description: Turn recurring bugs into 'Lessons Learned' snippets for your public portfolio.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize this bug fix into a professional, high-level technical blog post format suitable for a developer portfolio.
steps.claude_code_command: claude chat 'Summarize the logic fix in the last commit for a portfolio case study'

steps.title: Test with AI-Driven Scenarios
steps.description: Use Claude Code to simulate edge cases that break your application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a test suite for the current module that specifically targets edge-case inputs and potential race conditions.

steps.title: Deploy and Showcase
steps.description: Finalize your project and link your automated documentation to your portfolio site.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a README.md file that highlights the technical challenges solved and the system architecture used.

pro_tips: Treat your logs as your primary documentation; if it isn't logged, it didn't happen in your portfolio.
Use Claude Code to perform 'Rubber Ducking'—explain your bug to the AI and let it suggest the refactor.
Always commit your 'broken' state as a separate branch; it serves as proof of your problem-solving process.
Standardize your variable naming across all projects so AI tools can interpret your codebase faster.
Build a 'Bug Library' folder in your repo; it’s a goldmine for showing clients how you handle complex edge cases.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, integrate these automated debugging patterns into your next three client builds to create a consistent, high-value technical narrative.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs define your velocity and start letting your process define your value. Transform your workflow into a high-converting asset today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
